Ayara.description:
Activate Carrion Feeder by sacrificing Gravecrawler, putting a +1/+1 counter on Carrion Feeder.
Cast Gravecrawler from your graveyard to the battlefield by paying {B}.
Ayara and Carnival of Souls trigger.
Resolve the Ayara trigger, causing each opponent to lose 1 life and you to gain 1 life.
Resolve the Carnival of Souls trigger, causing you to lose 1 life and add {B}.
Repeat.

Activate Warren Soultrader by paying 1 life and sacrificing Gravecrawler, creating a Treasure token.
Activate the Treasure by tapping and sacrificing it, adding {B}.
Cast Gravecrawler from your graveyard by paying {B}.
When Gravecrawler enters, Ayara triggers, causing you to gain 1 life and each opponent to lose 1 life.
Repeat.

produces: Near-infinite creature tokens for all players
Ayara.description:
Cast Plague of Vermin by paying {6}{B}.
Resolve Plague of Vermin, choosing to pay all but one life and create that many black Rat tokens.
For each Rat tokens that enters the battlefield, Ayara triggers, causing you to gain that many life and each opponent to lose that many life.

Ellivere.description:
Declare the creature with Breath of Fury attached and Ellivere of the Wild Court as attackers.
Ellivere of the Wild Court's first ability triggers, creating a 2/2 Cat creature token with haste due to Jinnie Fay.
Deal combat damage using the creature that has Breath of Fury attached.
Breath of Fury and Ellivere of the Wild Court's second ability triggers.
Resolve the Breath of Fury trigger, causing you to sacrifice the creature it is attached to, then attach Breath of Fury to the Cat token, then

produces: Infinite untap of creatures you control
Infinite mana creatures you control can produce

Suspend.description:
Activate the mana-producing creature by tapping it, adding at least {2}.
Activate Alaundo by tapping it, drawing two cards and exiling a card from your hand, and removing a time counter from all other cards previously exiled with this ability.
Tolarian Kraken triggers, causing you to pay {2}, untapping Alaundo and the mana-producing creature.
Repeat.

produces: Cast a portion of the cards in your library and hand without paying their mana costs
Suspend.description:
Activate Alaundo the Seer by tapping it, causing you to draw a card and exile a card from your hand with time counters on it equal to its mana value, then removing a time counter from each other card you own in exile.
The Locust God triggers, creating a 1/1 Insect creature token with flying and haste.
When the Insect enters the battlefield, Intruder Alarm triggers, untapping all creatures.
Repeat.

Ognis.description:
Declare five creatures you control with haste as attackers.
Ognis triggers five times, creating five tapped Treasure tokens.
Activate Time Sieve by tapping it and sacrificing the Treasures, causing you to take an extra turn after this one.
Repeat each turn.

produces: Cast any spell of your choice from your library
Infinite cast triggers for all spells in your library
Neera.description:
Cast any noncreature spell, paying its costs.
Neera and Displacer Kitten trigger, as do any Storm abilities or other cast triggers of the spell.
Resolve Displacer Kitten's ability, blinking Neera.
Resolve Neera's ability, putting the spell you cast on the bottom of your library, revealing cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card, casting that card without paying its mana cost, and putting the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
Repeat from step 2 any n

Nazgul.description:
Cast Whipsers of the Muse with buyback by paying {U}.
Lord of the Nazgûl triggers, creating a 3/3 Wraith creature token.
Resolve Whipsers of the Muse, causing you to draw a card and return Whipsers of the Muse to your hand.
Activate Phyrexian Altar by sacrificing the Wraith, adding {U}.
Repeat.

Cast Mystic Speculation with buyback by paying {U}.
Lord of the Nazgûl triggers, creating a 3/3 Wraith creature token.
Resolve Mystic Speculation, causing you to scry 3 and return Mystic Speculation to your hand.
Activate Phyrexian Altar by sacrificing the Wraith, adding {U}.
Repeat.

Cast Clockspinning with buyback by paying {U}.
Lord of the Nazgûl triggers, creating a 3/3 Wraith creature token.
Resolve Clockspinning, causing you to return Clockspinning to your hand.
Activate Phyrexian Altar by sacrificing the Wraith, adding {U}.
Repeat.

Cast Whim of Volrath with buyback by paying {U}.
Lord of the Nazgûl triggers, creating a 3/3 Wraith creature token.
Resolve Whim of Volrath, returning it to your hand.
Activate Phyrexian Altar by sacrificing the Wraith, adding {U}.
Repeat.

produces: Return any number of permanents to their owner's hand
Nazgul.description:
Activate The Tenth Doctor by paying {7}, removing all time counters from Reality Strobe.
Reality Strobe triggers, causing you to cast it from exile without paying its mana cost.
Lord of the Nazgûl triggers, creating a creature token.
When the creature token enters, Mana Echoes triggers, adding {C} for each creature you control that shares a creature type with the token.
Resolve Reality Strobe.
Repeat.

Activate The Tenth Doctor by paying {7}, removing all time counters from Inspiring Refrain.
Inspiring Refrain triggers, causing you to cast it from exile without paying its mana cost.
Lord of the Nazgûl triggers, creating a creature token.
When the creature token enters, Mana Echoes triggers, adding {C} for each creature you control that shares a creature type with the token.
Resolve Inspiring Refrain.
Repeat.

produces: Reduce the toughness of creatures opponents control to 0
Nazgul.description:
Activate The Tenth Doctor by paying {7}, removing all time counters from Festering March.
Festering March triggers, causing you to cast it from exile without paying its mana cost.
Lord of the Nazgûl triggers, creating a creature token.
When the creature token enters, Mana Echoes triggers, adding {C} for each creature you control that shares a creature type with the token.
Resolve Festering March.
Repeat.

Activate The Tenth Doctor by paying {7}, removing all time counters from Arc Blade.
Arc Blade triggers, causing you to cast it from exile without paying its mana cost.
Lord of the Nazgûl triggers, creating a creature token.
When the creature token enters, Mana Echoes triggers, adding {C} for each creature you control that shares a creature type with the token.
Resolve Arc Blade.
Repeat.

produces: Put all creature cards from your library and graveyard onto the battlefield with finality counters on them
Nazgul.description:
Activate The Tenth Doctor by paying {7}, removing all time counters from Charnel Serenade.
Charnel Serenade triggers, causing you to cast it from exile without paying its mana cost.
Lord of the Nazgûl triggers, creating a creature token.
When the creature token enters, Mana Echoes triggers, adding {C} for each creature you control that shares a creature type with the token.
Resolve Charnel Serenade.
Repeat.

Activate Spellbinding Soprano's encore ability by paying {3}{R} and exiling it from your graveyard, creating a token copy of it with haste for each opponent you have.
Declare each Spellbinding Soprano token as an attacker.
Each Spellbinding Soprano token triggers, causing instant and sorcery spells you cast this turn to cost {1} less to cast for each Spellbinding Soprano token.
Cast Sprout Swarm with buyback by tapping a green creature and any other creature you control.
Lord of the Nazgûl trigg
